name: SistemaAsistenciaEventosST
description: Sistema de asistencia para eventos con roles Administrador, Encargado y Guardia.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/unit/viewHelpers.test.js && node --test tests/unit/encargadoService.test.js && node --test tests/unit/personaModel.test.js && node --test tests/unit/participacionModel.test.js && node --test tests/unit/ingresoModel.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/viewHelpers.test.js && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/encargadoService.test.js && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/personaModel.test.js && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/participacionModel.test.js && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/ingresoModel.test.js && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/integration/httpFlows.test.js && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/e2e/fullFlow.test.js
